exercises.name: Smith Machine Front Squat
exercises.description:
1. Start by standing in front of the bar, set to chest height. 

2. Rest the bar on the front of your shoulders by bringing your elbows up to parallel with the floor, and clasping your hands.

3. Reach your hips back and descend into a squat. Return to the start position and repeat.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Glute Bridge
exercises.description:
1. Start by lying on your back on a bench underneath the bar. Align the bar so it rests in your hip crease.

2. With knees bent to 90 degrees, and feet flat on the bench, push your hips up towards the ceiling, flexing your glutes at the top of the movement.

3. Return to the start position in a controlled fashion and repeat.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Hanging Leg Raise
exercises.description:
1. Start by resting the bar in your armpits, with the bar set to chest height. 

2. Slowly bring your legs up until they're parallel to the floor in front of you. 

3. Return to the start position under control, and repeat.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Hip Thrust (B Stance)
exercises.description: Smith Machine Hip Thrust (B Stance)

exercises.name: Smith Machine Incline Bench Press
exercises.description:
1. Start by lying on a bench, angled at 45 degrees, with the bar in line with your chest.

2. Grip it at shoulder-width, and slowly lower the bar down to your chest. 

3. Press it back up to the start position. Repeat.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Incline Press
exercises.description: Smith Machine Incline Press

exercises.name: Smith Machine Incline Push-Up
exercises.description:
1. Hands placed on the Smith machine bar at an incline.

2. Body stays in a straight line from head to heels.

3. Lower chest toward the bar with control.

4. Press through the hands to return to the start position.

5. Adjust bar height to increase or decrease difficulty.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Jump Squats
exercises.description:
1. Start by standing with the bar resting on your shoulders, and feet shoulder-width apart. 

2. Descend into a squat slowly, then push yourself back up to a start position explosively, leaving the floor at the top. 

3. Land softly, and repeat.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Reverse Crunch
exercises.description:
1. Start by lying on your back with the bar set to hip height. 

2. Bring the bottoms of your feet up to the bar while keeping your knees straight. 

3. Drive your hips up towards the ceiling while squeezing your abdominals tight. 

4. Slowly return to the start position and repeat.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Reverse Grip Bent Over Row
exercises.description:
1. Start by reaching your hips back, and keeping a long spine position.

2. Grip the bar with both hands, palms facing up. Keeping the bar in line with your chest, lower it slowly until your arms are straight.

3. Pull the bar towards your chest, keeping an open chest position and driving your elbow towards the ceiling.

4. Repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Reverse Grip Single Arm Bent Over Row
exercises.description:
1. Start by reaching your hips back, and keeping a long spine position.

2. Grip the bar with one hand, palm facing up. Keeping the bar in line with your chest, lower it slowly until your arm is straight.

3. Pull the bar towards your chest, keeping an open chest position and driving your elbow towards the ceiling.

4. Repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Reverse Lunge
exercises.description:
1. Start by resting the bar across your upper back, with your feet together. 

2. Step one foot back, planting the toes on the ground behind you. 

3. Slowly descend into the hip and knee of the front leg while keeping your body in line with the bar. 

4. Press your front foot into the floor, and push yourself back up to a standing position with feet together.

5. Repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Seated Shoulder Press
exercises.description:
1. Start seated upright with the bar at shoulder height, next to your chest.

2. With hands on the bar at shoulder-width, press the bar directly up overhead until your arms are straight.

3. Slowly lower the bar back down to the start position and repeat.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Seated Single Arm Shoulder Press
exercises.description:
1. Start seated upright with the bar at shoulder height, next to your chest. 

2. Using a single arm, press the bar directly up overhead until your arm is straight.

3. Slowly lower the bar back down to the start position and repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Shrug
exercises.description:
1. Start by standing in front of the bar at hip height, with hands shoulder-width on the bar. 

2. While keeping your elbows straight, drive your shoulders upwards and backwards towards your ears. 

3. Hold the squeeze for a moment before slowly returning to the start position.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Side Bends
exercises.description:
1. Start by standing parallel to the bar, holding it at hip height with a single hand.

2. Bend to the side, towards the bar, while staying as tall as possible. 

3. Squeeze the obliques on the opposite side of your abdomen, and return to the start position.

4. Repeat on the opposite side.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Single Arm Bench Press
exercises.description:
1. Start by lying on a bench with the bar in line with your chest.

2. Grip it with a single arm, and slowly lower the bar down to your chest. Press it back up to the start position. 

3. Repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Single Arm Bent Over Row
exercises.description:
1. Start by reaching your hips back, and keeping a long spine position. 

2. Grip the bar with one hand in line with your chest, and lower it slowly until your arm is straight.

3. Pull the bar towards your chest, keeping an open chest position and driving your elbow towards the ceiling.

4. Repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Single Arm Decline Bench Press
exercises.description:
1. Start by lying on a bench, angled downwards to 45 degrees, with the bar in line with your chest. Keep your feet locked in for safety. 

2. Grip it with a single arm, and slowly lower the bar down to your chest. Press it back up to the start position.

3. Repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Single Arm Incline Bench Press
exercises.description:
1. Start by lying on a bench, angled at 45 degrees, with the bar in line with your chest. 

2. Grip it with a single arm, and slowly lower the bar down to your chest. Press it back up to the start position.

3. Repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Single Arm Shrug
exercises.description:
1. Start by standing parallel to the bar, at hip height, gripping it in one hand. 

2. While keeping your elbow straight, drive you up and backwards towards your ear, holding for a moment before returning to the start position.

3. Repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Single Arm Upright Row
exercises.description:
1. Start by standing in front of the bar, at hip height, with a single hand gripping it. 

2. Drive your elbow up and outwards, bringing the bar up to chest height. 

3. Slowly return down to the starting position.

4. Repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Single Leg Calf Raise
exercises.description:
1. Start by placing a step, or a plate beneath the bar to stand on. Allow your heel to drop off the back of the step. 

2. Place the bar on your upper back, and come up onto a single leg.

3. Slowly lower on a single leg, while keep your knee straight, until your heel touches the floor. 

4. Push yourself back up and squeeze your calf at the top position. 

5. Repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Single Leg Squat
exercises.description:
1. Start by standing on a single leg, with the bar resting on your upper back. 

2. Descend into a squat on a single leg, while reaching your opposite foot forward. 

3. Press yourself back up to a standing position. 

4. Repeat on the opposite side.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Sissy Squat
exercises.description: Smith Machine Sissy Squat

exercises.name: Smith Machine Sit Up
exercises.description:
1. Start by lying on your back, with the bar resting in your hands, in line with your chest. 

2. Flex your abdominals, drive your chest up towards the ceiling, and sit upwards.

3. Slowly control yourself back to the start position. Repeat.

exercises.description: Smith machine squats HACK ðŸ‘†ðŸ» #squat #squatsworkout #smithmachine #gymshark

exercises.name: Smith Machine Stability Ball Chest Press
exercises.description:
1. Start by lying on a stability ball, with knees bent, and chest in line with the bar.

2. Place a your hands on the bar, and slowly lower it down to touch your chest.

3. While keeping the body stiff, press the bar back up to the start position. Repeat.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Stability Ball Single Arm Chest Press
exercises.description:
1. Start by lying on a stability ball, with knees bent, and chest in line with the bar. 

2. Place a single arm on the bar, and slowly lower it down to touch your chest. 

3. While keeping the body stiff, press the bar all the way back up to the start position. 

4. Repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: SMITH MACHINE step up #fitness #workout #howto #glutes #growth
exercises.description: SMITH MACHINE step up #fitness #workout #howto #glutes #growth

exercises.name: Smith Machine Sumo Deadlift
exercises.description:
1. Start standing next to the bar, set to hip height, with a wide stance. 

2. Reach your hips back, bend your knees, and lower the bar down towards your mid-shin. 

3. Drive your hips forward while keeping your chest up, and stand up tall. Repeat.
